calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brianna K. Mannion for petitioner San Francisco Public Administrator (via Zoom).
Heirs in attendance via Zoom: Aram Alexander, Celeste Alexander, Denise Alexander, Suzanne Alexander, Susan Lichtenberg, Roger Steiger.

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Letters of Administration.

Ms. Mannion addressed the issues raised in the tentative ruling regarding the use of post office box addresses for certain heirs, the declaration of due diligence concerning Madeline Smith, and the sufficiency of nominations filed in support of the Public Administrator's appointment. She reported that the closest living relative has nominated the San Francisco Public Administrator and that notice has been provided to all known heirs.

The Court found the explanations regarding the post office box addresses and the due diligence efforts sufficient under the circumstances, determined that no additional nominations or declinations were required at this time, and waived any further requirements.

The Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
